node.text: Dave went to a car show last Friday and enjoys checking out awesome cars and car mods.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "hobby pick up") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Dave is into working on cars, finding it calming and a way to take him out of his head.

node.text: Dave restored a car last year but sold it to a collector and is currently working on a new project.

node.text: Dave finds working on cars to be cathartic and a way to connect back with himself.

node.text: Working on cars is like therapy for Dave and a way to get away from everyday stress. He sees it as more than a hobby, but a passion.

node.text: Dave finds working on cars therapeutic and relaxing, particularly restoring an old Ford Mustang found in a junkyard.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "hobby pick up") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.95)

node.text: Dave restored and modified a car himself, adding a custom exhaust and performance upgrades.

node.text: Dave spent hours as a child tinkering with engines in his dad's garage, finding it to be like his sanctuary.
